methodsAttempted.query: site:fudan.edu.cn 生成式人工智能 政策
methodsAttempted.notes: Found research institute pages, no official university-wide policy

methodsAttempted.query: site:fudan.edu.cn 本科毕业论文 AI 工具 规定
methodsAttempted.notes: Found reference to undergraduate thesis AI policy
Found student affairs guidance referencing AI policy
Confirmed policy exists but document requires internal access

summary: Discovered public official Fudan evidence for undergraduate-thesis AI tool rules, but not a comprehensive university-wide AI policy. The strongest usable evidence is an official Student Affairs Office page that quotes the rule requirements. A public file-compilation page confirms the policy title exists, while a candidate college PDF URL returned 404 during local repair and was rejected. The approved claim is intentionally limited to undergraduate thesis writing.
